item.title: JacobsBen: Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 26s Marco Rose a leading contender to replace Andoni Iraola as revealed with @alex_crook yeste
item.description:
Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 26s Marco Rose a leading contender to replace Andoni Iraola as revealed with @alex_crook yesterday. Talks already took place.
Kieran McKenna viewed as expensive. Cita Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 20h Exclusive: Former Dortmund boss Marco Rose is a leading contender to replace the outgoing Andoni Iraola at Bournemouth.
Ipswich's Kieran McKenna is another potential option.
@alex_crook 31

item.title: AlasdairGold: Alasdair Gold @AlasdairGold · 2min Adi Hutter has been speaking about Tottenham's interest in him before Roberto De Zerb
item.description: Alasdair Gold @AlasdairGold · 2min Adi Hutter has been speaking about Tottenham's interest in him before Roberto De Zerbi took the job. De football.london 1 4 537

item.title: Jack_Gaughan: Jack Gaughan @Jack_Gaughan · 4min My dad bought this for £1 last week. Think it was published in 1949, before his Ballon
item.description: Jack Gaughan @Jack_Gaughan · 4min My dad bought this for £1 last week. Think it was published in 1949, before his Ballon d’Or and a little cup final in ‘53 13 431

item.title:

Which #FPL asset
item.description:
Fantasy Premier League @OfficialFPL · 11min Man City Burnley Leeds Brighton Bournemouth Chelsea
Which #FPL assets are you planning to bring in from the SIX clubs that have an upcoming Double Gameweek? 16 12 101 11 mil
